scope: Codex roster gap review after discovering that Thibault "Tibo" Sottiaux is absent from the People table.
usage: Inputs for scripts/audit/discover_codex_roster_gaps_mimo.mjs. Treat these as source hints, not as automatic database truth.
sourcePolicy: Prefer official OpenAI pages, official social profiles, GitHub accounts, and direct interview/podcast pages.
Do not create a person record from model memory alone.
If the source supports a Codex role but not a formal PM title, use lead/head/design/product wording instead of product manager.

sources.evidenceNote: OpenAI Forum event identifies Thibault 'Tibo' Sottiaux as Member of Technical Staff at OpenAI and Head/lead of Codex, OpenAI's software engineering agent.
supportedClaims: Thibault Sottiaux is associated with OpenAI.
Codex should be described as OpenAI's software engineering agent.

sources.evidenceNote: GitHub profile name is Thibault Sottiaux and handle is tibo-openai; repositories include a fork of openai/codex.
supportedClaims: Likely official GitHub handle for Thibault Sottiaux.
Useful as an officialLinks candidate after manual identity check.

sources.evidenceNote: Podcast page describes Alexander Embiricos as leading product on OpenAI Codex and discusses Codex growth and workflows.
supportedClaims: Alexander Embiricos leads product on Codex at OpenAI.
He belongs to the modern Codex product/agent roster.

sources.evidenceNote: Interview page identifies Alexander Embiricos as product lead for Codex at OpenAI and focuses on Codex workflows.
supportedClaims: Alexander Embiricos is a Codex product lead.
He is a good roster candidate for the product/operator side of AI coding agents.

sources.evidenceNote: Apple Podcasts page for Software Engineering Daily says Thibault Sottiaux is the Codex engineering lead and Ed Bayes is the Codex product designer.
supportedClaims: Thibault Sottiaux is the Codex engineering lead.
Ed Bayes is the Codex product designer.
Both are publicly associated with Codex through a direct interview page.

sources.evidenceNote: Topic page says Ed Bayes leads design on Codex at OpenAI.
supportedClaims: Ed Bayes appears to be a Codex design lead/designer.
Treat as medium confidence until confirmed by official profile or direct interview page.
